title: GM cuts 600 IT workers to hire AI specialists in strategic workforce swap
description: BitcoinWorld GM cuts 600 IT workers to hire AI specialists in strategic workforce swap General Motors has laid off more than 10% of its information technology department, affecting approximately 600 salaried employees, in a deliberate skills swap designed to clear out legacy roles and make room for workers with artificial intelligence expertise. The automaker confirmed the layoffs to Bitcoin World after they were first reported by Bloomberg News. A [...] This post GM cuts 600 IT workers to hire AI specialists in strategic workforce swap first appeared on BitcoinWorld .

title: AI disruption emerges as new political battleground for PAP and WP; Guide recounts final moments of Singaporean hiker killed in volcano eruption: Singapore live news
description: Welcome to Yahoo Singapore's live updates, your guide to some of the most compelling stories unfolding across the digital universe and beyond. Today, we're featuring a curated selection of some of the biggest, most important, and fascinating news that's making waves online.

title: AI job growth in India rising 15–20%: Ashwini Vaishnaw
description: Speaking at the CII Annual Business Summit, he urged industry bodies and companies to collaborate with Nasscom to prepare talent for the next wave of technological change.

title: Smarter search for fuel-cell catalysts using machine learning
description: A computational method combining generative AI with atomistic simulations can identify promising platinum alloy catalyst structures for hydrogen fuel

title: Agentic AI shifts customer journeys from static automation to adaptive decisioning across channels
description: Agentic AI in customer support doesn't just flag problems-it routes tickets, executes actions, and adapts based on outcomes without waiting for a human prompt. The shift from generative to agentic changes who decides what happens next.
